step_rationale: Anchors TRL atherogenicity; inhibits lipoprotein lipase; promotes ApoB-lipoprotein retention and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: ApoC3 on atherogenic remnants attenuates clearance and intensifies subendothelial lipid retention, plaque inflammation, and rupture risk in Type 1 MI.
